Contentful was last valued at more than $3 billion in a 2021 Series F round […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AI is crushing startup valuations for companies that raised before ChatGPT existed https://thenextweb.com/news/ai-startup-valuations-pre-chatgpt-fallen-unicorns Mon, 01 Jun 2026 14:10:10 +0000 TheNextWeb=80a5c63100a690e91a50824310341d96 The AI boom has created a two-speed startup economy.
